plan_type_rationale: Audit phase (Phase 1) must complete and be reviewed before any field removal or freezing (Phase 2). Phase 2 is a hard stop gated on the written audit matrix.

phases.title: Audit IndexingResult + IndexingStatistics + IndexingError Field Coverage
phases.description: Read-only audit phase. Map every field on IndexingResult, IndexingStatistics, and IndexingError to its invariant test coverage. Produce a written audit matrix identifying which fields are covered, which are freeze-candidates, and which are remove-candidates. No code changes in this phase.

tasks.description: Read IndexingResult, IndexingStatistics, IndexingError interfaces in src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts (lines 278-353). List all fields.
tasks.success_criteria: Complete field list for all three interfaces documented

tasks.description: Read __tests__/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.test.ts and __tests__/pipeline/indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts. For each field in step 1.1, note which AC test(s) reference it.
tasks.success_criteria: Field-to-test coverage matrix complete; zero fields unclassified

tasks.description: Grep all other consumers of IndexingResult, IndexingStatistics, IndexingError across the codebase (CLI, scripts, other tests). Note any non-test usages of uncovered fields.
tasks.success_criteria: Consumer map complete; no uncovered field has a silent non-test consumer

tasks.description: Run npm test. Confirm AC-05a and AC-05b pass before any changes. Record baseline pass/fail state.
tasks.success_criteria: Test suite passes; AC-05a and AC-05b confirmed green

tasks.description: Write the audit matrix to coderef/workorder/rag-index-schema-reduction/audit-matrix.md: per-field disposition (keep / freeze / remove) with rationale. Must include DR-1 (chunksSkippedDetails = KEEP) and DR-PHASE-7-B constraint.
tasks.success_criteria: audit-matrix.md exists; every field has a disposition with rationale

phases.title: Remove or Freeze Uncovered Fields
phases.description: Apply the Phase 1 audit matrix. Remove fields classified as remove-candidates. Mark fields classified as freeze-candidates with a JSDoc freeze comment. Verify AC-05a (2415===2415) and AC-05b (263===263) still PASS after all changes.
phases.gate: Phase 1 audit-matrix.md complete and reviewed; AC-05a + AC-05b passing at Phase 1 baseline

tasks.description: Read audit-matrix.md from Phase 1. Confirm disposition for every field before making any change.
tasks.success_criteria: All dispositions confirmed; chunksSkippedDetails is KEEP

tasks.description: In indexing-orchestrator.ts: remove fields classified as remove-candidates (filesProcessed, processingTimeMs, estimatedCost) from IndexingResult / IndexingStatistics interfaces and their production assignments.
tasks.success_criteria: TypeScript compiles with 0 errors after removal

tasks.description: In indexing-orchestrator.ts: add JSDoc freeze comment to fields classified as freeze-candidates (chunksSkipped, chunksFailed, stats, errors, chunksFailedDetails, all IndexingStatistics required fields, all IndexingError fields). Comment format: /** @frozen — no invariant test; must not be modified without adding a paired test. */
tasks.success_criteria: All freeze-candidates annotated; TypeScript compiles clean

tasks.description: Run full test suite: npm test. Confirm AC-05a and AC-05b still PASS. Confirm no regression in any other test.
tasks.success_criteria: All tests pass; AC-05a (chunksSkipped element-grain === fixture) and AC-05b (uniqueFiles file-grain === validation_report.header_missing_count) both PASS

tasks.description: Commit all changes: feat(rag): IndexingResult schema reduction — remove uncovered fields, freeze untested fields
tasks.success_criteria: Clean git commit on CODEREF-CORE; no untracked changes
